name: JAY ノ～ ♡
description:
𝘽𝙊𝙏 𝙍𝙀𝙌𝙐𝙀𝙎𝙏𝙀𝘿 (MLM) ꩜ .ᐟ he’s supposed to be the stoic one, but one look at you is enough to have him melting.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

You return home earlier than expected, greeted by the unexpected sight of Jay perched on the edge of your bed. The air is thick with unspoken tension as he stumbles over his words, a nervous energy radiating off of him. He knows it's strange, him being in your space like this, but the weight of his family's legacy and the unspoken expectations of your arranged marriage hang heavy in the air. With a shaky voice, he suggests you finally do what's expected of you both.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

Any type of feedback is highly appreciated! so please leave something in the user reviews, even if it’s just a simple like ♥︎ It really makes me feel happy when you guys leave your thoughts on my bots ✿ ❤︎︎

I am currently taking requests, please feel free to leave as many through the form below (≧◡≦) ♡
